WIRE-1.control_assertion: beforeSuspend.statusCode.not.toBe(401) — proves session was live before suspend
WIRE-1.non_inert_proof: removing validateSessionPreHandler guard yields 200 post-suspend; toBe(401) fails

WIRE-2.control_assertion: owner POST /api/v1/invites brand_admin role → 201 (proves not globally 403)
WIRE-2.main_assertion: brand_admin POST /api/v1/invites brand_admin role → 403 AND error.code === 'FORBIDDEN'
WIRE-2.non_inert_proof: removing hierarchy guard in inviteService.createInvite yields 201; toBe(403) fails

WIRE-3.control_assertion: returnedIds.toContain(inviteAId) — proves org-A invite is visible
WIRE-3.non_inert_proof: removing auth.workspaceId GUC scoping includes org-B invite; not.toContain(inviteBId) fails

findings.title: Real-network wire-smoke: suspend→401 on next protected call
findings.resolution: WIRE-1 in member-wire-smoke.live.test.ts — app.inject GET /api/v1/auth/me after suspendUser returns 401 SESSION_REVOKED; control assert proves 200 before suspend; 3 tests green in 71ms

findings.title: Real-network wire-smoke: brand_admin→brand_admin invite = 403
findings.resolution: WIRE-2 in member-wire-smoke.live.test.ts — app.inject POST /api/v1/invites with brand_admin token returns 403 FORBIDDEN; owner control returns 201; non-tautological

findings.title: Real-network wire-smoke: pending-list org-scoped HTTP assertion
findings.resolution: WIRE-3 in member-wire-smoke.live.test.ts — app.inject GET /api/v1/invites?status=pending with org-A session; contains inviteAId; not.toContain(inviteBId); all org_ids === ORG_A_ID

findings.title: Full e2e suite rate-limiter exhaustion (pre-existing, non-Track-B regression)
findings.note: Pre-existing test-infra limitation. No change in delta commit.

negative_control.protection_removed: validateSessionPreHandler guard (WIRE-1); hierarchy check in inviteService.createInvite (WIRE-2); auth.workspaceId GUC scoping (WIRE-3)
negative_control.captured_RED_output: Tests executed (not skipped): WIRE-1 asserts afterSuspend.statusCode===401 (would fail→200 without guard); WIRE-2 asserts forbiddenResp.statusCode===403 (would fail→201 without hierarchy check); WIRE-3 asserts not.toContain(inviteBId) (would fail if org-B invite leaks through)
